productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Check Laertes Red Shirts
description: CompositionRed and white plaid check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has light blue and dark blue accents, tape detailing on inseam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with buttoned closure, full length buttoned placket, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and button at the elbows, and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  red and white plaid check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up for a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
